pr.title: Record: Train Larger, Quantize Harder - 33.6M params + int5 GPTQ / (val_bpb: 1.1164)

output.summary: Int5 QAT-trained 33.6M model uses Hessian GPTQ with pruning plus a post-TTT temperature rescore to squeeze more capacity while correcting overconfidence.
techniques: Int5 QAT with per-row Hessian GPTQ and pruning to fit 33.6M params
Score-first TTT followed by fixed T=0.98 rescore to undo TTT-induced overconfidence
